textByHash.529e916b1e50ff68a1a965643b5c32ab7b975243: Don't listen to them Bobby. You're just a little different.
textByHash.5a07f3624c0231700a855a7c8b371c9900419688: Yes Bobby. There's no doubt we will be sipping mulled pine inside The Nutcracker in no time.
textByHash.f8e5caaaf107cec50d1f42b0069325eb3c630e61: And you're very rude for a human.
